_doc: Team-shared Claude Code settings for agent-guard. Wires Layer 1 (PostToolUse real-time review) and Layer 2 (PreToolUse PreCommit gate) of the three-layer audit workflow. Layer 3 (weekly cron) is registered per-machine via the schedule skill; see .claude/workflows/weekly-deep-audit.sh. Per-machine permissions live in settings.local.json (gitignored).
